name: colorpicker
description:
colorpicker

Google Chrome Extension

scripts.dist: rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist/styles dist/scripts && cp src/manifest.json src/index.html dist/ && cp src/css/style.css src/css/tailwind.css dist/styles/ && cp src/scripts/index.js dist/scripts/ && cp -r src/icons dist/ && sed -i '' 's|href="css/tailwind.css"|href="styles/tailwind.css"|g; s|href="css/style.css"|href="styles/style.css"|g; s|src="scripts/index.js"|src="scripts/index.js"|g' dist/index.html
